title: Burchett: Briefer Named 'Names, Dates, People and Locations' of UAP Programs
detail: In an interview with Stephen A. Smith, Rep. Tim Burchett (R-TN) stated that a classified briefer had 'named names, dates, people in the meetings, where these items, if you will, are located.' Burchett said he had spoken with White House contacts that same day and believed 'some things will be coming out soon,' adding 'Trump's the guy to do it.' The statements were among the most specific yet from a sitting congressman about the content of classified UAP briefings, pointing toward concrete program details being on record with congressional investigators.
confidenceReason: Congressman's public statement; classified briefing contents not independently verifiable

media.caption: Rep. Burchett interview on UAP classified program details
